name: noc-bea-portal
description: beA card-reader workflow and evidence companion.

interface.longDescription: Local beA workflow companion for BRaK beA/ERV readiness, beA card or token availability, card-reader and Client Security checks, mailbox/eEB task planning and evidence capture without storing PINs, card data, mailbox secrets or mandate content in Git. The plugin uses the beA visual mark from the BRaK beA & ERV page as a local recognition cue; beA remains the authoritative system.
defaultPrompt: Check beA card-reader and Client Security readiness.
Create a Day1 plan for NoC beA Portal.
Review Day2 drift for NoC beA Portal.
